positive_prompt:
Generate one game tileset atlas as a single structured sheet.
Atlas pixel style: full.
Gameplay view: top-down.
Atlas content type: terrain.
Use a transparent background outside the rectangular atlas only.
Use a 4 by 3 grid with 64x64 logical tiles.
The whole atlas must read as a 4 by 3 sheet of square cells, with a wide landscape aspect ratio that matches the grid.
Do not generate a square canvas, portrait canvas, or vertically stretched tile sheet for this atlas.
Do not copy any rounded frame or decorative outer border from the layout guide.
Treat this as an engine-facing tileset atlas, not a showcase image or presentation board.
Fill each full tile cell edge-to-edge with tile artwork.
Do not leave gutters, padding bands, empty borders, or framing space between neighboring cells.
Keep every object inside its assigned footprint.
Do not add labels, text, UI, borders, guide marks, or extra cells.

Atlas objects in reading order:
- soil_plain_light: light bare soil tile, role ground (continuous ground surface), footprint 1x1 tile(s), origin (0, 0), pixel mode full, repeatable seamless tiling in both directions.
- soil_plain_dark: dark bare soil tile, role ground (continuous ground surface), footprint 1x1 tile(s), origin (1, 0), pixel mode full, repeatable seamless tiling in both directions.
- soil_hoed_dry_a: hoed dry soil variant A, role ground (continuous ground surface), footprint 1x1 tile(s), origin (2, 0), pixel mode full, repeatable seamless tiling in both directions.
- soil_hoed_dry_b: hoed dry soil variant B, role ground (continuous ground surface), footprint 1x1 tile(s), origin (3, 0), pixel mode full, repeatable seamless tiling in both directions.
- soil_hoed_watered_a: hoed watered soil variant A, role ground (continuous ground surface), footprint 1x1 tile(s), origin (0, 1), pixel mode full, repeatable seamless tiling in both directions.
- soil_hoed_watered_b: hoed watered soil variant B, role ground (continuous ground surface), footprint 1x1 tile(s), origin (1, 1), pixel mode full, repeatable seamless tiling in both directions.
- soil_fertilized_dry_a: fertilized dry soil variant A, role ground (continuous ground surface), footprint 1x1 tile(s), origin (2, 1), pixel mode full, repeatable seamless tiling in both directions.
- soil_fertilized_dry_b: fertilized dry soil variant B, role ground (continuous ground surface), footprint 1x1 tile(s), origin (3, 1), pixel mode full, repeatable seamless tiling in both directions.
- soil_fertilized_watered_a: fertilized watered soil variant A, role ground (continuous ground surface), footprint 1x1 tile(s), origin (0, 2), pixel mode full, repeatable seamless tiling in both directions.
- soil_fertilized_watered_b: fertilized watered soil variant B, role ground (continuous ground surface), footprint 1x1 tile(s), origin (1, 2), pixel mode full, repeatable seamless tiling in both directions.
- soil_path_worn: worn walked-on soil tile, role ground (continuous ground surface), footprint 1x1 tile(s), origin (2, 2), pixel mode full, repeatable seamless tiling in both directions.
- soil_transition_soft: soft transition soil tile, role ground (continuous ground surface), footprint 1x1 tile(s), origin (3, 2), pixel mode full, repeatable seamless tiling in both directions.

Preserve clean grid alignment across the whole atlas.
Objects marked repeatable should read as seamless when tiled adjacent to copies of themselves in their declared repeatability directions.
For repeatable full tiles, paint through the relevant repeatability edges cleanly.
negative_prompt:
Do not draw isolated tiny props floating in cells intended as full surfaces.
Do not leave large transparent margins inside cells.
Do not shrink artwork into partial occupancy behavior.
Do not break edge continuity on repeatable surfaces.
Do not spill artwork outside assigned cell or footprint boundaries.
Do not introduce visible gutters, padding bands, frame lines, or empty border strips between tiles.
Do not present the atlas as a mockup, poster, card sheet, or gallery board.
Do not add text, labels, grid marks, shadows outside cells, extra decoration, or any rounded outer frame.
